text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of Satono<n>Diamond's planned
staff appreciation<n>event!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here! The event you've all<n>been
waiting for—the staff<n>appreciation race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our first group of racers is already<n>bursting with
energy as they wait by<n>the gate for the race to
start!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all your help, everyone!<n>Let's have
lots of fun today!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you too for creating such a<n>precious
opportunity to show<n>everyone our gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I won't be losing this race. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I won't be losin' this either! I'mgonna give my thanks to the staffwith my overwhelmin' victory!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please! The academy's staff<n>members do so
much for us on a<n>daily basis...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We want to hold a staff appreciation<n>race for
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that day, Satono Diamond<n>and the
others have been working<n>hard to organize
today's event.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And lastly, the twelfth event will be a<n>1,200-meter
turf race. There, now the<n>race schedule is all done!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll go distribute the invitations to<n>everyone now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but I'll be fine! I actually<n>want to hand
out these invitations in<n>person.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for always keeping<n>everything clean
and in order. I hope<n>you'll attend so that we might
show<n>you the fruits of our labor.

text_block_list.name: Maintenance Management Staff
text_block_list.text:
You did all this for us?! We'll<n>definitely come
cheer you on with all<n>we've got!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We wouldn't be able to build<n>ourselves up for our
races properly<n>without the meals you lovingly
make<n>for us!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Staff
text_block_list.text:
It's more than enough thanks just<n>hearing that
from you. We're greatly<n>looking forward to the
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all of Satono Diamond's<n>worrying over how
to thank the<n>academy's staff, the answer turned
out to be plain and simple.
choice_data_list:
(If everyone is rooting for you to run well, then you
just have to show off your appreciation by
running well for them, huh?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all once again for coming<n>to today's
event!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All of us here passed through the<n>gates of this
academy holding a<n>dream close to our hearts...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's due to the support we receive<n>from every
single person working<n>here at the academy that
we are able<n>to chase our dreams every day, free
of worry.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We're bolstered by all the work you<n>do. And to
show just how important<n>that work is...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please watch us in this event we've<n>prepared for
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You came to watch too!
choice_data_list:
It seems you were able to convey your feelings to
everyone!

It seems you were able to convey your feelings to
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, I was!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Listening to everyone's cheers has<n>made me
realize yet again just how<n>much everyone
supports us!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for all your help!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Allow me to congratulate you<n>on a
successful event as well. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It warms my heart to see all the staff<n>enjoying
themselves so much!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
By the way... Would you two happen<n>to have any
plans after today's<n>races?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After learning of today's event, the<n>director
mentioned wanting to show<n>her own appreciation
to the<n>academy's students and staff.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing major, but she offered to<n>hold a
celebratory after-party. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That would be incredible! We'd<n>be able to
spend even more time<n>talking with all the staff!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But before that, I have to give it my all<n>in the next
race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Dia! It's almost our turn to<n>run!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! Coming!
choice_data_list: Good luck! I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Satono Diamond's<n>staff
appreciation event ends in a<n>roaring success!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Dia, there you are! Hurry up, it's<n>almost our
turn to run!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You gotta make sure you're nice and<n>ready so
you'll be at your best during<n>the race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll be there in just a second!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Please watch me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run my best and show<n>everyone the
extent of my gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The excitement in the venue reaches<n>a fever pitch
as the heated races<n>continue. Naturally, the
runners hold a<n>winning concert to close off the
event.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And finally for today, we'd like to<n>pour all our
feelings into this song for<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I hope our feelings reach you all!Please enjoy our performance ofWe Are Dreamers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and the other<n>Umamusume sing
with such power<n>and emotion that their voices
resound<n>far and wide for all to hear.
